name: Steve Chabot
subject: Could This Actually Be a Pretty Good Election Cycle for Republicans?
body:
Could This Actually Be a Pretty Good Election Cycle for Republicans? No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Could This Actually Be a Pretty Good Election Cycle for Republicans?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-j/)
We've been hearing an awful lot about the coming "blue wave". But while The Left and their friends in the media talk about it, Republicans in Congress along with the President have been getting real things done for the American people. Which leads me to wonder, could this actually be a pretty good year for Republicans? Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [About As Different As You Can Get](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-d/)
There's a lot to talk about in a typical race for a congressional seat. Using the First Congressional District of Ohio for example, there are a great many differences between my opponent, Democrat Aftab Pureval, and myself. Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Is There Anything That Can Be Done to Reduce Gas Prices?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-u/)
If you've filled up your gas tank recently, you're aware that prices have been going through the roof. They've gone from about $2.29 a gallon to approximately $3.00 a gallon in what seems like no time. Is there anything that can be done to reverse this trend? Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Is Trump Right in Moving the American Embassy to Jerusalem?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-n/)
President Donald Trump moved our embassy in Israel to their capital city of Jerusalem this week. Was it the right move? Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-p/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-m/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-c/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jykuxht-kujkulhluu-a/)

name: Troy
subject: Thank you for your support

body:
Heather and I want to thank all of you for your outpouring of support throughout this journey. While last night didn’t have the results we hoped for, I’m proud of everything that our campaign accomplished over this past year. Montana deserves so much better than Jon Tester, who has run farther to the left in a desperate attempt to keep his seat in the Senate.
| | | | [ ](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwhkly-yhdyitiujj-r/)
---
Peter,
Heather and I want to thank all of you for your outpouring of support throughout this journey.
While last night didn’t have the results we hoped for, I’m proud of everything that our campaign accomplished over this past year.
Montana deserves so much better than Jon Tester, who has run farther to the left in a desperate attempt to keep his seat in the Senate.
Jon Tester has perfected the art of saying one thing in Montana while doing the exact opposite in Washington.
But I know Montanans aren’t going to put up with him any longer.
President Trump needs more Republicans in Washington to help him pass his America First agenda. I hope you join me in supporting Republicans in Montana and all across America.
Again, thank you so much for your support over this past year. It was truly an honor and I hope to continue advocating for you and Montana’s veterans for a long time to come.
Thank you,
Troy
P.S. We gave it everything we had and exhausted all our resources in the race. [Please consider chipping in a few extra dollars to help us close out the books and pay our all-star campaign staff.](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwhkly-yhdyitiujj-y/)

subject: Thank you.
body:
Nationwide Progressive candidates took on the establishment and won in an unconventional way. | | | | [ ](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=47f7b18206&e=3c6155f94b)
---
| | |
---
|
### Last night, we didn't lose.
When I got home last night my daughter woke up and asked if we had won. I hugged her and said, "Baby, we didn't lose. Nearly 8,000 people rejected dark money and corruption, defied political party voter control and didn't fall victim to the lies used against us. **We ARE the revolution."**

Across the nation Progressives are winning in this same unconventional way. They've earned thousands of votes because our message transcends party lines. _**We are a piece of a revolutionary puzzle and we are on our way to completing it, one election at a time.**_
---
| [ ](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=572aaac8b1&e=3c6155f94b)
---
Our journey was amazing! Thank you for being there with us, every step of the way. #TeamRoza
| I'm incredibly proud of our renegades - our army of volunteers that stood tall with us against the establishment. We all wore 20 hats and ran a clean, no-nonsense campaign, and we never, not once, abandoned our Progressive values and platform.

Over 50% of our votes came from low propensity voters: honest, hard working, law-abiding Americans whose livelihoods are in danger; yet, who other campaigns neglect because they can't buy influence. The 99% is who takes the biggest hit from careless policy from our failing leadership - to that we say no more!

Our work isn't done. We will keep fighting for justice: healthcare, judicial, economic, education, environmental, and immigration. We will continue our work to get money out of politics to restore democracy and we hope you join us.

I'm grateful for every single person who believed in our campaign, locally and nationwide.

Thank you,

Roza Calderon

When I got home last night my daughter woke up and asked if we had won. I hugged her and said, "Baby, we didn't lose. Nearly 8,000 people rejected dark money and corruption, defied political party voter control and didn't fall victim to the lies used against us. We ARE the revolution." Across the nation Progressives are winning in this same unconventional way. They've earned thousands of votes because our message transcends party lines. We are a piece of a revolutionary puzzle and we are on our way to completing it, one election at a time. | Our journey was amazing! Thank you for being there with us, every step of the way. #TeamRoza | I'm incredibly proud of our renegades - our army of volunteers that stood tall with us against the establishment. We all wore 20 hats and ran a clean, no-nonsense campaign, and we never, not once, abandoned our Progressive values and platform. Over 50% of our votes came from low propensity voters: honest, hard working, law-abiding Americans whose livelihoods are in danger; yet, who other campaigns neglect because they can't buy influence. The 99% is who takes the biggest hit from careless policy from our failing leadership - to that we say no more! Our work isn't done. We will keep fighting for justice: healthcare, judicial, economic, education, environmental, and immigration. We will continue our work to get money out of politics to restore democracy and we hope you join us. I'm grateful for every single person who believed in our campaign, locally and nationwide. Thank you, Roza Calderon | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.electroza.org | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2018 Roza Calderon for Congress 2018, All rights reserved.

name: The White House
subject: Unapologetic American leadership on the world stage
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df03204f1ccf97056c0695210ed5ab6a26d32b46cb31a84d739de75b73ed1cb4a29e7167b2886fd366a51e2db522f7f63305) The White House • June 7, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump will host Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe at the White House. [Watch the joint presser in the Rose Garden at 2 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df03c799e4aa4bee52c018a9ad7477793290b54532598b28d7af5883dd7aeb0112b55404185b1683c035de321d65b1b8b51c)
---|---
• | Just published: [500 days of unapologetic American leadership on the world stage ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df03a769f3c4a881e1880a58b0335482563bddf273f1ac0147b93dfe45dc1a3659491a7da8b7e0a2400eb41de01b909904b0)
• | Vice President Mike Pence turns 59 today. Happy birthday, Mr. Vice President!

---
|

## A historic moment for America's veterans
**President Trump took an important step yesterday** toward addressing how the United States treats its veterans, signing the VA Mission Act of 2018. The law will transform the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) into a high-performing and integrated healthcare system for the 21st century by putting patient choice at the core of the VA program.
**"Four years ago, our entire Nation was shocked and outraged** by stories of the VA system plagued by neglect, abuse, fraud, and mistreatment of our veterans," President Trump said. "With us today are many brave veterans who endured that grave injustice, including Steve Cooper and Laura Vela. They served their country with honor, only to be denied the medical treatment they desperately needed."
**The President explained how the new law will help veterans** like Cooper and Vela in the future: "If the VA can't meet the needs of a veteran in a timely manner, that veteran will have the right to go right outside to a private doctor."
[Learn more about this historic moment for America's veterans.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df037aa1cc749df99668e0e68d22dec0aea1aababe94f9c5343cb43b24c3f7f54c9f52ae2a30307a9e5ba2a1ff4a8de4d649)
**Watch** : [See highlights from yesterday's signing ceremony](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df036dd24ab98f9d848a8af54ee1081b1ec3b0373d3af2f9e866aa9beff63970d2cb88a2eb82a9b451f33c05512aa5ba764d)

---
|

## 500 days of making government for the people
**Americans deserve accountability from their government** , President Trump says. Through the first 500 days of the Trump Administration, the President has refocused the Federal bureaucracy to make sure that voters are truly in charge of Washington:
• | President Trump has issued multiple Executive Orders that **reform the Civil Service** , including making union contracts open to public inspection, cutting down on taxpayer-funded union activities at Federal agencies, and easing the process to remove poor-performing workers.
---|---
• | The Administration is operating under a **"One Federal Decision"** memorandum of understanding for infrastructure, which puts the burden of coordinating complex permitting reviews on Federal officials, not applicants.
• | Despite obstruction from Congressional Democrats, the President has appointed a **record number of Federal judges** who are interpreting the law as it is written, promoting federalism, and standing for Constitutional liberties to combat government overreach.
[President Trump's 500 days of making government accountable again](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df0399f08df9c189aa6da55c3e040b1a37995a1e3fe4cd997408dcc38ec4cc82756ec989229e67adb03bf6ceac9d43988082)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**First Lady Melania Trump joins President Donald J. Trump and Cabinet officials at the 2018 hurricane briefing at FEMA HQ** | June 7, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df03c2d5aa51c478d0ae880a79667122c1a06e47999cb17270ceaad0b3a7e4f8461dd8fb406cea453d8ea4780594bf1647f0) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53e7ce690940df0356841f52be1441039988352cdad32ff55d648822904d741acb2acdaef644bf2593f5aaf2094bd2131bca8753284a55f3) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4e9b9dd28f37b3b0d0baf42c86e57e23cbf86ebf3272d862f693c382ca9837fc4aa225361533fbe8f1d40f1c741da4335c6500be116c02930)

Friend,

And we've got an extra special one coming up... We'll soon be celebrating the birthday of Vice President Pence, who also happens to be the love of my life.

I want to give Mike a card signed by all of our most enthusiastic supporters. **[Will you add your name by 9:00 PM tonight, Friend?](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=17169601849824caa693f90b333ebfdf818c27aa0fc0f460332493e616152cb793616e9051ef956d0766fca42bd8143bac824b60b40fef9b)**

name: Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
subject: Diaz-Balart votes to make it easier to drill off shore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OylWwre0WaIdtmgQ-e_e1BPd2U79lZZuqMb_-HwhC_E=/A7jwNHVn830cYAOjQdzlGXzgVKis-wk238-tfoOM33A=?refcode=june-7-Diaz-Balart-is-harming-the-everglades)

Friend,
This is a perfect example of why I chose to step up and run for Congress.
**My opponent, incumbent Rep. Mario Diaz-Balart, just voted to allow more offshore drilling.**
With this vote, Congressman Diaz-Balart has made it abundantly clear: clean water, a safe environment, and the health of our communities are not his priorities whatsoever.
Of the four members on the House Appropriations Committee from Florida, Diaz-Balart was the only one to side with oil and gas companies -- once again selling out his own district.
**Sadly, we shouldn 't be surprised because we've seen this time and time again from Congressman Diaz-Balart:** FL-25 is home to an incredibly large swath of the Everglades, one of our most precious ecosystems. The individual who is elected to represent this natural treasure should understand the special responsibility they hold- Mario Diaz-Balart does not. For instance, less than two years ago in 2016 Congressman Diaz-Balart voted to create a pathway for offshore drilling all along Florida's panhandle and entire western coast!
Frank Matzner, from The National Resources Defense Council, said it best:
"Representative Diaz-Balart has passed up a chance to protect Americans from Trump's extreme offshore drilling plan, which he has said he opposes," remarked Franz Matzner, director of federal affairs for the NRDC.
"His vote instead helps pad oil industry profits, and abandons the beach communities who'll bear the risk of oil spills, along with every citizen who'll experience the effects of the extreme weather made worse by increasing carbon pollution."
No representative from Florida - Republican or Democrat - should ever risk our state's economy, environment, and wildlife to win favor from oil and gas industry lobbyists.
[**Help ensure I am elected so that I may serve as a protector of Florida 's coasts and our economy. Donate here to my campaign against Mario Diaz-Balart today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OylWwre0WaIdtmgQ-e_e1BPd2U79lZZuqMb_-HwhC_E=/A7jwNHVn830cYAOjQdzlGXzgVKis-wk238-tfoOM33A=?refcode=june-7-Diaz-Balart-is-harming-the-everglades)
**\- Mary**

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: [MEMO] 2018 strategy update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
With fewer than five months to go until Election Day, I wanted to give you an update on the Democratic Party's 2018 strategy.
---
With fewer than five months to go until Election Day, I wanted to give you an update on the Democratic Party's 2018 strategy.

The Democratic gains we need to take back control of Congress and flip state legislatures are going to take an incredible amount of work -- but they're within reach.

That's why I'm excited to share three key programs that will help elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year:

### 1\. The IWillVote campaign
An ambitious plan to reach 50 million American voters between now and Election Day. Together we'll ask people to commit to vote, help them register, provide voter education and protection, and make sure they cast their ballot.

### 2\. Best Practices Institute
The DNC is committed to providing state parties and candidates at all levels with the information and tools they need to grow their base of support and build winning campaigns. With your help, we will invest in innovative solutions while building on the tried-and-true strategies of grassroots organizing.

### 3\. Every ZIP Code Counts
Gone are the days when Democrats are unwilling to play in states or districts that are "too red." We are organizing and competing everywhere to win elections in 2018 and beyond. Through our Every ZIP Code Counts program, the DNC increased its monthly investment to $10,000 to every state party across the country. We will be fighting to win seats -- from the school board to the Senate -- in communities across the country through an unprecedented commitment to grassroots organizing.

These programs are an effort to mobilize a record number of voters ahead of the midterms -- and our success depends on supporters like you who are ready to step up and build this organization. We truly cannot win in November without your help, so I'm asking you today.

**Now is the perfect time to make your first donation of 2018. Will you donate $3 right now to support Democrats nationwide?**

** Bringing our message to people across the country to encourage them to get involved and vote is going to require our time, our energy, and our commitment. It's also going to take investment. Democrats running for office across the country simply can't win unless they have the resources to reach as many voters as possible -- that's why the national party is stepping up.

Here's a rundown of 2018 by the numbers: Democrats need 23 House seats and two U.S. Senate seats to take back control of Congress. There are also 36 gubernatorial races and more than 6,000 state legislative races on the ballot nationwide this year.

This is a huge opportunity for Democrats to see sweeping victories up and down the ballot. But what we accomplish in November depends on what we do today.

clean_body: With fewer than five months to go until Election Day, I wanted to give you an update on the Democratic Party's 2018 strategy. With fewer than five months to go until Election Day, I wanted to give you an update on the Democratic Party's 2018 strategy. The Democratic gains we need to take back control of Congress and flip state legislatures are going to take an incredible amount of work -- but they're within reach. That's why I'm excited to share three key programs that will help elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year: 1\. The IWillVote campaign An ambitious plan to reach 50 million American voters between now and Election Day. Together we'll ask people to commit to vote, help them register, provide voter education and protection, and make sure they cast their ballot. 2\. Best Practices Institute The DNC is committed to providing state parties and candidates at all levels with the information and tools they need to grow their base of support and build winning campaigns. With your help, we will invest in innovative solutions while building on the tried-and-true strategies of grassroots organizing. 3\. Every ZIP Code Counts Gone are the days when Democrats are unwilling to play in states or districts that are "too red." We are organizing and competing everywhere to win elections in 2018 and beyond. Through our Every ZIP Code Counts program, the DNC increased its monthly investment to $10,000 to every state party across the country. We will be fighting to win seats -- from the school board to the Senate -- in communities across the country through an unprecedented commitment to grassroots organizing. These programs are an effort to mobilize a record number of voters ahead of the midterms -- and our success depends on supporters like you who are ready to step up and build this organization. We truly cannot win in November without your help, so I'm asking you today. Now is the perfect time to make your first donation of 2018. Will you donate $3 right now to support Democrats nationwide? "" "" "" "" "" "" Bringing our message to people across the country to encourage them to get involved and vote is going to require our time, our energy, and our commitment. It's also going to take investment. Democrats running for office across the country simply can't win unless they have the resources to reach as many voters as possible -- that's why the national party is stepping up. Here's a rundown of 2018 by the numbers: Democrats need 23 House seats and two U.S. Senate seats to take back control of Congress. There are also 36 gubernatorial races and more than 6,000 state legislative races on the ballot nationwide this year. This is a huge opportunity for Democrats to see sweeping victories up and down the ballot. But what we accomplish in November depends on what we do today. "" Thanks for your support, Amanda Amanda Brown Lierman Political & Organizing Director Democratic National Committee Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. body:
| Hey Friend, I have a fairly serious question that I would like to ask you. We’ve got two months left until the August primary. That’s not a lot of time. The momentum is certainly on our side. Our campaign’s support continues to grow while Josh Hawley’s campaign decays. However, if we do not continue to fuel the growth of our campaign, we will most certainly fail. I realize that last sentence sounds a little bleak. However, I feel a tremendous amount of responsibility to the liberty movement, the voters, volunteers, and my supporters to be as honest as possible and do everything I can to win this race. It can be a lot of pressure sometimes. Which brings me to my question... [**Friend, will you make your first online donation to the campaign? name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: [Video] What's wrong with our state and how do we fix it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I want people to know exactly what my priorities will be as AG and the experience that I bring to the table.
#
Peter -
We just put out our campaign's first video, and I wanted to share it with you.
New York is an extraordinary, big-hearted state, but our government is a mess. As our next Attorney General, I will put a stop to this corruption and help put us on a new path.
I want people to know exactly what my priorities will be as AG and the experience that I bring to the table, and I think this video does just that.
**[Watch the new video outlining our vision for the next Attorney General then chip in $3 today to help us share our message with more voters.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e16/6e822e2f/188fb9d6/41721088/2550295514/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDctYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-video-launch?refcode=em180607-a")**

subject: As a mom, this one really got to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6698/51dbcc2a/7d7b4c5/3a53af2/3329234249/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Hi there,

My daughter is a year and a half old. She is bright and spunky and full of energy. Chasing after her and watching her grow is the greatest joy, but wow, is it physically exhausting and frankly, expensive.

That's why Joanne, Emily and Carter's story is so moving to me, and why I'm honored to share it with you today. Emily was 18 when she told her mom, Joanne, that she was addicted to heroin. When she was 21, Emily gave birth to Carter. Nine months later, she relapsed and died of a fatal overdose. Now Joanne, who is in her 60s, is raising her granddaughter and is responsible for all that it entails -- long nights, lots of chasing and carrying, not to mention a retirement plan and budget completely readjusted to account for Carter's care.

**_[You can watch Joanne tell her story -- and how Bob Casey is helping families like hers -- here](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6698/51dbcc2a/7d7b4c5/3a53af3/3329234249/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/videos/10155504436146088/")_**.

Joanne and Carter are why I'm proud to work for Bob. After experiencing such profound loss, Joanne is doing everything she can to provide a good life for her granddaughter while Bob is working hard, with Democrats and Republicans, to help Joanne give Carter the best possible childhood.

I want every voter who asks what Bob is doing for Pennsylvania families to see this ad. This is exactly why Bob is running for re-election -- so he can continue to be a voice for working families trying to keep food on the table and a roof over their loved ones' heads.

So please, watch this ad, then share it on Facebook or forward this email to show your friends and neighbors what Bob is doing for working families across Pennsylvania: [WATCH THE AD](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6698/51dbcc2a/7d7b4c5/3a53af3/3329234249/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/videos/10155504436146088/") Thanks, as always, for your help,

Simone

Finance Director
Bob Casey for Senate

Friend -- Taking the next step in his historic grassroots campaign, Richard officially filed as a candidate for the US Senate.
The political establishment wants him to go away, but the citizens of Minnesota have shown that they don’t want another establishment candidate. They want a candidate like Richard, who speaks out against corruption and dark money in politics, and will advocate for the interests of Minnesotans, not the special interests of Washington. Since he has launched his campaign, Richard has gained support from all sides of the political spectrum: all citizens who are concerned about the state of the nation. Filing for office cements a big step in this movement, but **we have a long way to go.** Unlike his opponents, Richard refuses to accept money from PACs, Super PACs, or other dark money organizations. He speaks for citizens, not CEOs. subject: Add your name and tell Scott Pruitt he must resign

body:
We can't even keep up with the number of scandals | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b4f5/c1f7015/687fa3bd/1142b18d/1991193585/VEsH/ "https://tinaforminnesota.com/") Friend- Scott Pruitt has one job as head of the EPA: protect human and environmental health. Instead, he's consistently sided with large corporations to roll back crucial environmental protections and even refused to accept the basic science of climate change. **If that weren 't bad enough, he's abused his power and used our taxpayer dollars to enrich and benefit himself personally.** Just this week, we found out Pruitt used his post to help his wife try to acquire a Chick-Fil-A franchise, asked an employee to run personal errands, including the purchase of a used mattress from Trump's hotel, and spent over $1,500 on personalized fountain pens for no apparent reason. He's got to go, immediately. [**Add your name here now and demand Scott Pruitt resign. We 've seen that with enough public pressure, we can force the Trump administration to act. That's why we need to send a strong message now to stop this blatant abuse of power. **](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b4f5/c1f7015/687fa3bd/1142b18e/1991193585/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180607_pruitt-resign?source=rtw_180606_em_pruitt-full") If he is allowed to stay in office for another two years, he will only continue to undermine the environment, block any progress on climate change, and be further empowered to abuse his office. subject: Days Like This...

body:
| | | |
---
| | | **|FNAME|*,**
For too long the liberal left have held a monopoly on creative talent in this fight. We will change that.

I know JFK had a theme song with Frank Sinatra, but Frank isn't available and I don't know if Frank was Republican.

Introducing the Sykes campaign theme song:

["DAYS LIKE THIS"](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=019e672821&e=9da9b0ca31) by Channing.

[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=bf1d7b6c73&e=9da9b0ca31)

**We need to revive and redefine the way that we share our Conservative message and our values.**

**We fight for tradition, for family values, for our faith. **

**We stand up against all odds in the name of liberty and under God.** **We remember the past while fighting for a future with no bounds. **

**We are proud that Lady Liberty has been a shining light in a world too often dark. **

We stand as individuals indivisible who together make America the beacon in which freedom finds solace.

_**As Conservative Republicans we must remember that these values are why we are standing on this side of the fight. **_

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c467c/24c69fd9/1aabff5ae/1881aa9d/3085349040/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER16N_digital_email_20180607_GASpotlight_inact&source=WQEFER16N_digital_email_20180607_GASpotlight_inact")

Peter,

Did you know that Donald Trump only won Georgia by a mere _five points_?

In fact, Georgia was closer than Iowa and Ohio -- both states most people think of as swing states. So why not Georgia, too? It's possible, because Georgians are getting younger and more diverse.

That's why we have big plans for the Peach State this year, including helping Stacey Abrams become the first-ever black woman governor, flipping two House seats, and electing even more state legislative candidates.

Last year, Democrats were able to flip a Senate seat in Alabama -- a state that voted for Trump by 28 points -- because we stepped up. Imagine what we can do if we invest in Georgia this year.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women turn Georgia blue and show Republicans that the entire map is in play this year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c467c/24c69fd9/1aabff5ae/1881aa9e/3085349040/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180607_email_GASpotlight?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFER16N_digital_email_20180607_GASpotlight_inact&source=WQEFER16N_digital_email_20180607_GASpotlight_inact")**

You might be surprised to know: We did great last year in Georgia.

The EMILY's List community helped four women win their special elections for Georgia state legislative seats -- including one who broke up the Republican supermajority in the state Senate.

And our efforts in Georgia this year are already off to a great start.

Stacey won by a landslide in her primary, and now, she has the chance to flip the governor's seat and make history. Both of our House candidates, who are running to flip red seats blue, advanced to runoffs that will be held in July. And we've endorsed five women for state and local office who are running strong campaigns.

I won't pretend breaking Republicans' grip on power will be easy -- but the momentum is on our side. This year is our chance to turn the tide and put Georgia Republicans on defense.

**Donate $3 to help elect our candidates in Georgia and across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Georgia-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c467c/24c69fd9/1aabff5ae/1881aa9f/3085349040/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180607_email_GASpotlight?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectGeorgiaWome&utm_campaign=WQEFER16N_digital_email_20180607_GASpotlight_inact&source=WQEFER16N_digital_email_20180607_GASpotlight_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain

body:

Hi there,
Granite Staters know that Lyme disease is no joke.
Every year, parents are diligent about checking their kids after an afternoon of playing outside, and gardeners and hikers alike check their skin for the dangerous insects.
That's because we know that it only takes one little tick to put children and adults in harm's way.
**We set a goal of 8,000 signatures for our petition calling on Congress to do more to prevent Lyme disease, but we 're not there yet. [It looks like you haven't had a chance to sign, so could you please add your name to help prevent the spread of this disease?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a4/2a380d31/ef21f7e/f19938/2257242622/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/prevent-lyme-disease/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_lyme_ja-up%26refcode%3De20180604_lymeja_act%26recurring%3Dauto")**
No one wants to wear long sleeves during the dog days of summer. But for Americans across New England (and in many parts of the rest of the country!), that's what they need to do to shield themselves from Lyme disease and its debilitating symptoms.
Lyme disease is serious. It can cause lifelong issues including joint pain, fevers, headaches, rashes, and more.
[**We can learn more about how to treat this disease, but only if we all speak up. Will you please sign our petition today?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a4/2a380d31/ef21f7e/f19938/2257242622/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/prevent-lyme-disease/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_lyme_ja-up%26refcode%3De20180604_lymeja_act%26recurring%3Dauto")

body:
As Michigan's Senator, I was opposed to Betsy DeVos as Education Secretary from day one. Before joining Donald Trump, Betsy DeVos used Michigan as a lab to test a radical education agenda that hurts
| | Derek,

As Michigan's Senator, I was opposed to Betsy DeVos as Education Secretary from day one. Before joining Donald Trump, Betsy DeVos used Michigan as a lab to test a radical education agenda that hurts public schools and helps the wealthy.

I haven't been shy about my opposition to Secretary DeVos and neither has my friend Tim Kaine.

**Tim has always had the backs of our students and teachers. I 'm asking you to join me in having his right now.**

[Chip in anything you can and help me keep Tim Kaine fighting for us in the Senate. He's in a tough reelection fight and every little bit counts.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f8/3e0906/645c4019/3e343d7b/2900210260/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donate-kaine-stabenow?refcode=20180607_1_FR_DS_DS-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+anything+you+can+and+help+me+kee&utm_campaign=20180607_1_FR_DS_DS-Surrogate&source=20180607_1_FR_DS_DS-Surrogate")

In the age of Donald Trump and Betsy DeVos, we need more people like Tim in Washington. Tim will work with anyone to get things done for working families.

That's the exact opposite approach of the guys running to replace Tim. If they get elected, they'll rubber stamp every bad idea and impulse from the Trump administration.

That's a disaster and we need to do everything we can to stop it.

[Can you donate and join me in standing with Tim? He's in a close race and he could use your help.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f8/3e0906/645c4019/3e343d7a/2900210260/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donate-kaine-stabenow?refcode=20180607_1_FR_DS_DS-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+donate+and+join+me+in+standing+w&utm_campaign=20180607_1_FR_DS_DS-Surrogate&source=20180607_1_FR_DS_DS-Surrogate")

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Schumer loses, but Missouri wins
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
To put it simply, we need to disappoint Chuck Schumer. Hello Peter,

It’s very clear that Chuck Schumer is confident about this November. He’s confident that he will become Majority Leader, confident that he will be able to raise taxes on the middle class, and most of all, _**he’s confident that he will keep his most reliable vote in the Senate, Claire McCaskill.**_
So, to put it simply, we need to disappoint Chuck Schumer.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: A year ago, Trump said he was "putting Youngstown first" by pulling out of the Paris Climate Accord. A year later, that couldn't be further from the truth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Clean energy has already created thousands of good-paying jobs across the our region. Our commitments to Paris would have grown that industry by leaps and bounds. By pulling out of the Paris Climate A | |
---
Folks, [A year ago, President Trump announced that he was pulling out of the Paris Climate Accord -- throwing the international fight against climate change into chaos.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a1/5486deaa/284c4506/dcc0873/3564814378/VEsH/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_june18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180607_paris") **When the President pulled out of the Paris Accord, he said he was "putting Youngstown first." This couldn't be further from the truth.** Clean energy has already created thousands of good-paying jobs across our region. Our commitments to Paris would have grown that industry by leaps and bounds. By pulling out of the Paris Climate Accord and locking us out of the clean energy future, **Trump isn 't saving Youngstown's economy -- he's slowly killing it.** [I'm joining with Democrats across the country to demand that the President honor our obligation to the Paris Climate Accord. It's time to send a strong message: Clean Energy is the way of the future.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a1/5486deaa/284c4506/dcc0873/3564814378/VEsE/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_june18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180607_paris") [SIGN ON >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a1/5486deaa/284c4506/dcc0872/3564814378/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_june18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180607_paris") We used to be the world leaders in clean energy. Now, thanks to Trump and the GOP Congress, it's _China_ that's taking the lead. China is on track to outperform its Paris pledge to peak emissions by 2030 and announced it would use more clean energy than fossil fuel by 2050. Meanwhile, Trump is locking the United States into the economy of the past. I've lived in the Ohio Valley my entire life. I know what it takes to rebuild our economy. We can't let Trump and the GOP drive us further into the past with false promises. **Economic prosperity starts with clean energy.** [Join me and Democratic leaders across the country in demanding that Trump and the GOP take action on Climate Change. With our futures at stake, we cannot stay silent.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a1/5486deaa/284c4506/dcc0873/3564814378/VEsC/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=ryan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftr_june18%3Frefcode%3Dem20180607_paris") Thanks you for all you do, \-- Tim [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a1/5486deaa/284c4506/dcc0875/3564814378/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_june18?refcode=em20180607_paris_30")

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Supreme Court ruling was important – but not enough
body:
Peter,
You may have heard, Monday the Supreme Court issued an important 7-2 ruling in favor of the Colorado Baker Jack Phillips. There’s more I want you to grasp about this story.
Jack refused to bake a wedding cake for a same-sex wedding back in 2012 because of his closely held religious beliefs, and he’s been in a legal (and spiritual) battle ever since.
I’m very grateful for this victory for Jack, but the narrow interpretation given by the Supreme Court in its decision only tinkers around the edges of fixing the real damage. There’s more that can be done, and you play a role. Please read on.
When the Supreme Court overturned centuries of law and tradition in its 2015 ruling that there is a right to same-sex marriage, it also created a huge muddle in which that newly-invented right conflicted with the enumerated First Amendment right to practice your religious beliefs without government restraint.
But the ink was barely dry before Christian bakers, florists and other wedding service providers in blue states were being sued, harassed, hounded, fined, branded as “haters” and driven into bankruptcy simply for declining jobs that would require them to violate their sacred belief in the Biblical definition of marriage.
That’s what happened to Jack. And the ruling made on Monday was great for Jack, but it didn’t address the broader issue of the aggressive assault on our nation’s First Amendment. Unfortunately, the Supreme Court didn’t issue a broad-based ruling reaffirming that the protection of religious freedom is the FIRST Amendment for a reason.
The door is still open for the liberal left to find ways to infringe on religious beliefs while being cagier about hiding their hostility to religion.
We must continue to work to secure religious liberty for _everyone_ to make sure more people don’t have to go through what Jack went through.
So, here’s where you come in.
**In this critical election year, we must elect officials - at the state and national level -**[who will work diligently to protect religious liberty and value human life in our courts](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180607apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180607apl01ndb&n=1).
[But we can’t do it without your help](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180607apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180607apl01ndb&n=2).
First, we must elect Senators at the Federal level who support our biblical values and will confirm conservative judicial nominees (like Gorsuch) to the highest courts.
It’s expected the President will nominate one or two more judges to the U.S. Supreme Court, and there are over 148 Federal court vacancies to be filled!
**If we lose critical Senate races to those who do not defend religious liberty – then we should expect attacks on our faith to increase in all areas of the public square across the country.**
Additionally, in November we will vote to fill 301 seats on State Supreme Courts and State Appellate Courts across the country – this amounts to a tremendous amount of power and influence!
This is what we are up against. It’s sobering.
The liberal left is well aware of the power the Senate can flex to hold up judicial confirmations. And they are well aware of what’s at stake on the state level for State Supreme Courts and Appellate Courts.
Let’s be clear. Our main line of defense to protect our freedom to practice our Christian faith – is our courts. We cannot afford to lose elections this year!
Peter, we estimate that if we do nothing, 51 million Christians will not vote this year. This is unfathomable, and we need to reach and equip more like-minded Christians. Will you help?
We have a proven plan at My Faith Votes to mobilize 90-million Christians in America to stand strong for Biblical principals at the polls. We will leverage TV, radio, events and digital media to inspire tens of millions of Christians, who usually don’t vote, to cast a ballot.
Leading up to the November 2016 elections My Faith Votes reached 1.5 million people per day because of your tremendous financial support and prayers. 85% of Christians we reached turned out to vote their values - well above the national average of 55%.
With your help, we can push back against the liberal left seeking to stifle religious liberty, and we can ensure future judicial nominees and appointments protect our most sacred right of religious liberty.
[Please consider giving your best donation today to mobilize like-minded Christians to vote!](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180607apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180607apl01ndb&n=3)
I know that if we are united in our work together, and prayerfully working to advance our biblical values, we can secure a hopeful future for faith in our nation. I know I can count on you.
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180607apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180607apl01ndb&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180607apl01ndb&n=5)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180607apl01ndb&n=6).

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Troubling health care news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
If Democrats weren't supporting Medicare for All by now, maybe this will change their minds.
#
Friends,
If Democrats weren't supporting Medicare for All by now, maybe this will change their minds.
The Medicare Trustees' report just came out. Its forecast? **The Medicare trust fund is set to run out by 2026 --three years earlier than last year's projection.**
[**Our health care system should not leave anyone behind. Your $1 contribution gives nearly 600 local groups and thousands of volunteers the resources to organize and push every Democratic candidate to support Medicare for All in this year's elections.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aac4/bed43eb/6a44e202/75fdf4e0/193410367/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em180607-full&noskip=true")
We have waited too long. Every day people suffer and die without the care they need. People in the wealthiest nation in the history of the world resort to GoFundMe pages and lemonade stands to raise money for cancer treatments. **It is grotesque and absurd** that our elected officials allow this to happen while the insurance and pharmaceutical industries rake in billion-dollar profits year after year on backs of the people. We have a moral obligation to put a stop to such an indefensible injustice.
Until we move to a single-payer, Medicare for All system, American health care will keep falling further and further behind. Multi-payer insurance bureaucracies compel people to pay more for less coverage. The Affordable Care Act was a step in the right direction, **but we need change in leaps and bounds.**
[**Now is the time to stand up to the special interests who dictate what can and can't be done to fix our health care --pitch in $1 right now to fight for a Democratic Party that makes Medicare for All a reality.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aac4/bed43eb/6a44e202/75fdf4e0/193410367/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em180607-full&noskip=true")
We cannot lurch from crisis to crisis, taking half-measure approaches that kick the can down the road for a couple of years. We must be **bold** , we must be **brave** , and we must **fight** for the universal coverage that every human being deserves.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

The Medicare trust fund is set to run out by 2026 --three years earlier than last year's projection. "" We have waited too long. Every day people suffer and die without the care they need. People in the wealthiest nation in the history of the world resort to GoFundMe pages and lemonade stands to raise money for cancer treatments. It is grotesque and absurd that our elected officials allow this to happen while the insurance and pharmaceutical industries rake in billion-dollar profits year after year on backs of the people. We have a moral obligation to put a stop to such an indefensible injustice. Until we move to a single-payer, Medicare for All system, American health care will keep falling further and further behind. Multi-payer insurance bureaucracies compel people to pay more for less coverage. The Affordable Care Act was a step in the right direction, but we need change in leaps and bounds. "" We cannot lurch from crisis to crisis, taking half-measure approaches that kick the can down the road for a couple of years. We must be bold , we must be brave , and we must fight for the universal coverage that every human being deserves. In solidarity, Nina Turner President Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. **Forrester Statement on 500 Days of Making America Great Again**
**For Immediate Release:** June 7, 2018**Contact:** Joe Sweeney, 603-225-9341
Concord - NHGOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement on President Trump's first 500 days in office: “On Tuesday, President Trump served his 500th day in office. Due to Republican leadership working for the American people, this was marked with historic economic success. Thanks to the hard work of our President and the GOP-led Congress, the landmark legislation of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act has led to record job growth, soaring consumer confidence, and a booming American economy. New Hampshire won’t forget that Republican leadership put money back into their pockets come November at the polls.”

body:
#
Peter --
Last week, Washington took talking points dreamed up in a backroom somewhere, removed from reality, and then turned them into our tariff policy.
**The effect of these job-killing tariffs is just like slapping a new tax on Tennesseans like you.**
As proposed, these tariffs will drive up prices, hurt our economy and cost us jobs -- especially in our important automotive sector. Retaliatory foreign tariffs that are sure to follow will hurt our exports, damaging farmers and even hitting iconic Tennessee brands like Jack Daniel’s.
I’m thankful that a bipartisan group of Senators is willing to speak up about the damaging effects of these tariffs on our state and nation -- and I’m glad these Senators are working together to put a stop to them. **Every Democrat and Republican ought to stand with them on this.**
[**Will you sign my petition calling on every Democrat and Republican who cares about our state to stand up against these tariffs? We need Washington to do better than this.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1361195/7441931/-646149374?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTcwMjNiNi1hYTZhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMTdsHs01sroCvF3Jjpj9YF3Fia3QAdZZiu_9xbY0rM=&ref=em180607-tariffs)

We hope you will stop by and give Jim a visit as he looks forward to spending time with you! Feel free to email at smjustus1977@gmail.com or call me at (260) 766-8046 if you have any questions.

Safe travels to Evansville!

Blessings,

name: Tori Taylor
subject: ALERT: Paul Ryan & North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Kathy has been making waves in this race. She's been all across this district talking with voters about the need for more affordable health care and better paying jobs for North Carolinians -- and she's gaining traction. From the contributions and volunteer hours of grassroots supporters like you to national political pundits talking about this race, we've got momentum behind us. This is one of the districts that could determine the majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. But we've said it from the beginning: the Washington political establishment and their special interest friends aren't going down without a fight. We've seen it before when they swooped in to buy Congressman Ted Budd this seat in 2016. Well, they're back. This week, Speaker Paul Ryan came down to North Carolina from Washington to raise money for his candidates. His Super PAC has already opened a field office in our district to prop up Congressman Budd. **We're facing our first FEC quarter deadline of the General Election this month.** We have to anticipate tons of Washington special interests spending against us -- which means we need to raise a LOT. [**_Our goal is $50,000 by June 30th. Can you give $5 or more to kick off the month?_**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427870/e3b7d3/5cacd479/2555d053/2636206860/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180607?refcode=kme180607_b") | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427870/e3b7d3/5cacd479/2555d053/2636206860/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180607?refcode=kme180607_b")
---
All the work we've done up to now has put us on a good path to success. As long as we can keep it up, we can give North Carolina families a representative that works for them, not for special interests.
Thanks for sticking with us!
Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress
